issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases for scanning failures.

scenarios.name: Weekly Nuclei CI scan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a generic GitHub Actions job that installs nuclei via go install and runs it with bare flags; treatment uses projectdiscovery/nuclei-action with -severity critical,high and -tags cve,misconfig and a step that fails on a non-empty report file.

scenarios.name: Custom YAML template for exposed .env
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests a curl-based check or a malformed template missing the matchers structure; treatment produces a valid Nuclei template with id, info.severity, http.path of {{BaseURL}}/.env, and matchers-condition:and combining a word matcher for DB_PASSWORD/API_KEY/SECRET with a status:200 matcher.
